name.en: Madurai Metro Rapid Transit System (DPR Phase)

budget.notes: DPR estimated cost for 31 km with 27 stations (26 km elevated, 5 km underground). Project submitted Dec 2024, rejected Nov 2025 - doesn't meet population criteria

timeline.completionNotes: DPR completed July 2023; construction target end 2024; operations December 2027

media.photoCaption: Madurai Metro DPR visualization - CMRL official gallery
